channel.title: Comments for page "2525 North Waterworks St."
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "2525 North Waterworks St."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"I thought it wasn’t affected by any psionics," replied Marcus. The

Incomplete sentence. If there's not supposed to be a sentence there, I'd delete "The". If there is, I'll give permission to allow that sentence to be edited to finish, unless there's more than one sentence supposed to go there… in which case, I'd just remove "The" and wait until after the contest to add it back in.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm neutral voting this installment as well. I don't find any fault with the writing. The overall narrative doesn't feel like it's being deepened or advanced here, however. Maybe that's an inherent issue with an after-action document, I'm not certain, but I don't really feel like my understanding of Lambda-5 changes at all after reading this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was suspenseful and entertaining enough to get me to upvote despite the use of reality bending as an X-mutant-gene-like generic power source.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I wasn't so sure about the SCP-2446, but between the GoI format and this, I'm really getting into Lambda-5. Good stuff.
